avoid_list: Quandl-based servers (deprecated API — migrated to Nasdaq Data Link, no active MCP wrappers)
mcp-fredapi (Jaldekoa) — only series_observations endpoint works; date/limit params broken
Bloomberg MCP (djsamseng/bloomberg-mcp) — requires Bloomberg Terminal + blpapi C++ SDK; impractical for most devs
Any MCP server last committed before Q1 2025 using only HTTP+SSE transport (deprecated March 2025 spec update)
Emir-Danisik/polygon-MCP — not a real Polygon server; it's a TypeScript notes-system boilerplate

servers.name: Octagon Market Intelligence MCP
servers.tools_summary: SEC filings analysis (10-K/10-Q/8-K/20-F/S-1 for 8K+ companies), earnings call transcripts (10 yrs history), financial metrics & ratios, stock market data (10K+ active tickers), private company research (3M+ companies), institutional holdings (Form 13F), crypto data. Sub-servers available for each domain.
servers.auth_notes: Free account at octagonai.co; generate key under API Keys menu
servers.risks: Free tier rate limits unknown; proprietary API — pricing may change; requires Node.js/npx
servers.use_cases: Full equity research workflow: pull 10-K/10-Q, analyze earnings transcripts, compare financials, screen stocks

servers.name: SEC EDGAR MCP
servers.tools_summary: CIK lookup, company info & facts, recent filings list, filing content retrieval, 8-K analysis, section extraction (e.g. MD&A, Risk Factors), financial statements with direct XBRL parsing, insider trading (Form 3/4/5 with transaction detail). Powered by edgartools library.
servers.auth_notes: Uses public SEC EDGAR API — no key required; SEC recommends setting User-Agent header
servers.maintenance: Actively maintained (last PyPI release Aug 2025, blog post Jul 2025)
servers.risks: SEC EDGAR has rate limits (~10 req/sec); very large filings may be slow; XBRL parsing accuracy depends on edgartools version
servers.use_cases: Pull exact 10-K/10-Q revenue/EPS figures with accession number citations; insider trading alerts; 8-K event analysis

servers.name: Financial Datasets MCP (Official)
servers.install_hint: Add https://mcp.financialdatasets.ai/ as remote MCP in Cursor (OAuth) OR: git clone + uv run server.py
servers.tools_summary: getIncomeStatement, getBalanceSheet, getCashFlowStatement, getStockPriceSnapshot, getHistoricalStockPrices, getFinancialMetrics (P/E, EV, revenue/share), getSegmentedRevenues (by product/geo segment), getFilings (SEC 10-K/10-Q/8-K), getCompanyNews, crypto prices
servers.auth_notes: OAuth for interactive use (no API key setup); API key available for programmatic/scripted workflows
servers.maintenance: Actively maintained (1.9k GitHub stars, Mar 2025 release)
servers.risks: Paid API beyond free tier; OAuth flow adds friction for local dev; segmented revenues coverage varies by company
servers.use_cases: 3-statement model pulls, segment revenue breakdowns, combined SEC filings + financial metrics in one server

servers.name: Alpha Vantage MCP (Official)
servers.install_hint: Add https://mcp.alphavantage.co as remote MCP URL in Cursor, or use hosted config
servers.tools_summary: TIME_SERIES_DAILY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY (OHLCV), COMPANY_OVERVIEW, INCOME_STATEMENT, BALANCE_SHEET, CASH_FLOW, EARNINGS, RSI/MACD/SMA (50+ technical indicators), forex rates, crypto prices, ETF/fund data, macroeconomic indicators, NEWS_SENTIMENT
servers.auth_notes: Free tier: 25 API calls/day, 500/month. Premium plans for real-time + higher volume. Get key at alphavantage.co
servers.risks: Free tier 25 calls/day is very restrictive for iterative research; paid plans required for serious use; no WebSocket streaming
servers.use_cases: Historical OHLCV for backtesting, technical indicator overlays, fundamental data, macro indicators, news sentiment

servers.name: finance-tools-mcp (yfinance + FRED + TA + Fear & Greed)
servers.tools_summary: get_ticker_data (overview/news/metrics/analyst recs), get_price_history (OHLCV + TA-Lib indicators + risk metrics + Fibonacci levels), get_financial_statements (IS/BS/CF quarterly or annual), get_institutional_holders, get_earnings_history, get_insider_trades, get_options, get_fred_series, search_fred_series, get_current_fng_tool (CNN Fear & Greed), cnbc_news_feed. LLM-optimized smart sampling for time series.
servers.auth_notes: FRED_API_KEY optional (higher rate limits from St. Louis Fed); no key needed for yfinance data
servers.risks: yfinance scrapes Yahoo Finance — Yahoo may change structure; TA-Lib C dependency may cause install issues on some systems; 40 stars suggests smaller community
servers.use_cases: All-in-one server for a coding agent: equity + macro + sentiment in a single uvx command

servers.name: Financial Modeling Prep MCP (FMP)
servers.tools_summary: Company profiles, income statements, balance sheets, cash flows, stock quotes (real-time & historical), earnings transcripts, financial ratios, key metrics, DCF valuations, institutional ownership, insider transactions, SEC filings, market movers, technical indicators
servers.auth_notes: FMP_ACCESS_TOKEN env var; free tier available at financialmodelingprep.com (limited endpoints)
servers.risks: FMP free tier is very limited; full feature set requires paid plan ($19+/mo); earnings transcripts and DCF on higher tiers only
servers.use_cases: Earnings transcript analysis, pre-built DCF endpoint, comprehensive financial ratios for comps analysis

servers.name: FRED MCP Server (Federal Reserve Economic Data)
servers.install_hint: uvx fred-mcp-server OR: git clone + uv run
servers.tools_summary: browse_categories (explore FRED taxonomy), search_series (by keyword or tags), get_series_observations (retrieve time series data with transformations: pct change, log, etc.) for any of 800K+ series including GDP, CPI, unemployment, treasury yields, mortgage rates, M2 money supply
servers.auth_notes: Free FRED API key from fred.stlouisfed.org — no cost, instant approval
servers.risks: FRED API rate limits: 120 requests/minute; no real-time data (FRED data typically monthly/quarterly); not affiliated with Federal Reserve
servers.use_cases: Macro backdrop for equity research, yield curve analysis, inflation/GDP context for earnings models, economic scenario modeling

servers.name: Yahoo Finance MCP (yfmcp / narumiruna)
servers.tools_summary: Stock info, historical prices (OHLCV), dividends, splits, income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, major holders, institutional holders, recommendations, options chain, news
servers.auth_notes: No API key required; wraps yfinance library which scrapes Yahoo Finance
servers.risks: Yahoo Finance ToS discourages scraping; yfinance may break without warning when Yahoo changes endpoints; no SLA; not for production pipelines
servers.use_cases: Zero-cost quick prototyping, personal research, fallback data source, options chain access

servers.name: Polygon.io MCP Server
servers.install_hint: git clone + npm install + node build/index.js
servers.tools_summary: get_ticker_details, get_latest_quote (real-time on paid), get_aggregates (OHLCV bars), get_daily_open_close, get_market_status, get_ticker_news, list_tickers, get_snapshot (multi-ticker)
servers.auth_notes: POLYGON_API_KEY; free tier available (delayed quotes); Starter $29/mo for real-time
servers.risks: Real-time data requires paid plan; community-maintained (not official Polygon); no npm package yet — must build from source
servers.use_cases: OHLCV bars for quant models, real-time quotes for live dashboards, multi-ticker snapshots

servers.name: Finnhub MCP (SalZaki)
servers.install_hint: Docker: docker build + docker run OR .NET: dotnet run
servers.tools_summary: Real-time SSE streaming + STDIO; stock quotes, company fundamentals, earnings calendar, technical indicators, IPO calendar, market news, sentiment data via Finnhub institutional-grade APIs
servers.auth_notes: FINNHUB_API_KEY; free tier: 60 API calls/minute for most endpoints; get key at finnhub.io
servers.risks: C#/.NET runtime required (less standard for JS/Python repos); Docker adds overhead; free tier 60 req/min; some premium endpoints gated
servers.use_cases: Real-time streaming quotes, earnings calendar integration, IPO pipeline tracking, institutional sentiment

skills.name: Anthropic Financial Modeling Suite (SKILL.md)
skills.install_hint: git clone anthropics/claude-cookbooks, then ln -s path/to/creating-financial-models ~/.claude/skills/ OR upload SKILL.md to Claude Skills in Claude.ai
skills.use_case: DCF valuation (perpetuity + exit multiple), Monte Carlo simulation, sensitivity analysis (tornado charts), scenario planning (base/bull/bear with probabilities). Generates Excel workbooks with formulas, color-coding conventions, and error checks.

skills.name: Anthropic Analyzing Financial Statements (SKILL.md)
skills.install_hint: Same as above (claude-cookbooks repo); or download individual SKILL.md
skills.use_case: Financial ratio calculator: ROE, P/E, Current Ratio, Debt/Equity, Gross Margin, EBITDA margin, etc. Interprets ratios with industry benchmarks. Takes raw financial statement data as input.

skills.name: Anthropic Financial Services Plugins (Enterprise Suite)
skills.install_hint: Clone repo; follow README to configure plugins for Claude for Enterprise. Includes equity-research, investment-banking, private-equity, wealth-management modules.
skills.use_case: Full institutional workflow: comps, DCF, LBO, 3-statement models, CIM drafting, earnings updates, IC memos, portfolio reporting. MCP connectors to Daloopa, Morningstar, FactSet, LSEG, PitchBook, S&P Global (enterprise accounts required for data connectors).

skills.name: SkillsMP Finance / Quant Collection
skills.install_hint: Browse skillsmp.com; download individual SKILL.md files; upload to Claude Skills or reference in system prompt
skills.use_case: 2300+ indexed skills. Finance-relevant: Stock Analysis (Yahoo Finance integration), DCF Valuation, Investment Memo generator, Company Research, SaaS Metrics (MRR/ARR/churn), Crypto Report. Search 'finance' or 'quant'.

skills.name: Market Expert MCP + Skill (Conare / Finnhub)
skills.install_hint: See conare.ai; combines Finnhub MCP server with Equity Researcher persona SKILL.md
skills.use_case: Automated equity research report generation. Institutional-grade Finnhub data + specialized Equity Researcher AI persona. Generates professional market research reports from a single ticker command.

skills.name: Claude Scientific Skills (K-Dense AI) — quant/time-series subset
skills.install_hint: git clone K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills; load relevant SKILL.md files (market-research-reports, data-analysis)
skills.use_case: 134+ scientific skills including time series analysis (ARIMA, GARCH), statistical modeling, data visualization. Useful for quant research overlaid on financial data from MCP servers.

skills.name: Earnings Transcripts MCP Bundle (MCPBundles / FMP)
skills.install_hint: Add MCPBundles server URL to Cursor MCP config; see mcpbundles.com for endpoint
skills.use_case: 3 tools: get transcript by symbol/quarter, list latest transcripts across market, check transcript availability dates. Powered by FMP Earnings Transcript API. Pairs with FMP MCP for full earnings workflow.
